extra_commands: cd /var/www/qrbanner && node -e "const bcrypt=require('bcryptjs');const {PrismaClient}=require('@prisma/client');(async()=>{const p=new PrismaClient();const u=await p.user.findUnique({where:{email:'onur@qrbanner.com'},select:{id:true,role:true,emailVerified:true,password:true,totpEnabled:true}});const ok=u?.password?await bcrypt.compare('112358Onrks..',u.password):false;console.log('USER',JSON.stringify({...u,password:u?.password?'set':'none',passwordOk:ok}));await p.$disconnect();})().catch(e=>{console.error('ERR',e);process.exit(1);});"
